interaction.prompt: Power play, 1-3-1. The PK has rotated to take away your point and weak-side winger. Where's the open pass?

feedback.right: Bumper. The PK pulled too hard to the perimeter — the slot opened up.
feedback.wrong: Point and weak-side winger are both shadowed. Look at the middle.

tip: When the PK overcommits to perimeter coverage on a 1-3-1 PP, the bumper opens up in the slot.
why: 1-3-1 power plays live off three options: bumper, weak-side flank, and point. When the kill cheats one, the others open up.
